# WINetworkSharingProvider.AccessPointConnection.Link

**Structure**

A data link to a Wi-Fi Access Point.

## Declaration

```swift
struct Link
```

## Overview

WiFi 7 (and later) clients and Access Points may have multiple concurrent data links between them.

## Structures

- **WINetworkSharingProvider.AccessPointConnection.Link.ID**: An opaque identifier for a given link.

## Instance Properties

- **bssidHash**: A hash of the Access Point’s BSSID, which can be used to find this access point link in the environment.
- **channel**: A channel on which the Access Point is operating.
- **description**: A string description of the link, for debugging purposes.
- **id**: A stable per-link ID that can be used to uniquely identify this link. ID will be stable for the lifetime of a given App launch.

## Conforms To

- CustomStringConvertible
- Decodable
- Encodable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- Identifiable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
